solutions.title: Solution
solutions.content:
Aenar Targaryen was a dragonlord of Valyria (an empire from a
A Song of Ice and Fire
) who moved his family to Westeros right before Valyria was destroyed.
pōja
means
their
and
verdon
means
sum
(or
amount
based on context) in High Valyrian (you can easily translate this on
Duolingo
).
In a nutshell: Print the sum of the array.
